_description: Minimal SCORM 1.2 package with 5 decorative-image violations across two pages. All five should be claimed and applied by the add-alt-decorative fixer.
notes: The add-alt-decorative fixer matches on decorative filename patterns (spacer, divider, pixel, blank, icon-small) and role=presentation. The exact count varies by what the static 1.1.1 check detects — we assert resolved > 0 and introduced == 0.
